name: turtlelootline-companion
description: Desktop companion for TurtleLootLine - syncs WoW gear data

scripts.release: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && electron-builder --win --mac --publish always && node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync('git add -A && git commit -m "release v'+p.version+'" && git tag v'+p.version+' && git push && git push --tags', {stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && electron-builder --win --mac --publish always && node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync('git add -A && git commit -m "release v'+p.version+'" && git tag v'+p.version+' && git push && git push --tags', {stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && electron-builder --win --mac --publish always && node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); execSync('git add -A && git commit -m "release v'+p.version+'" && git tag v'+p.version+' && git push && git push --tags', {stdio:'inherit'})"

author: Ronni
